'''ngadugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avens|avens]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-d-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avens|avens]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngadugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngædigith|ngædigith]] || [[word:ngædigij|ngædigij]] || [[word:ngædigish|ngædigish]] || [[word:ngædigi|ngædigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngaduduguth|ngaduduguth]] || [[word:ngaduduguj|ngaduduguj]] || [[word:ngadudugush|ngadudugush]] || [[word:ngadudugu|ngadudugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngaduguth|ngaduguth]] || [[word:ngaduguj|ngaduguj]] || [[word:ngadugush|ngadugush]] || [[word:ngadugu|ngadugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngadufguth|ngadufguth]] || [[word:ngadufguj|ngadufguj]] || [[word:ngadufgush|ngadufgush]] || [[word:ngadufguf|ngadufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngaduguthu|ngaduguthu]] || [[word:ngaduguju|ngaduguju]] || [[word:ngadugushu|ngadugushu]] || [[word:ngaduguku|ngaduguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngaduguth|ngaduguth]] || [[word:ngaduguj|ngaduguj]] || [[word:ngadugush|ngadugush]] || [[word:ngadugu|ngadugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngaduguthul|ngaduguthul]] || [[word:ngadugujul|ngadugujul]] || [[word:ngadugushul|ngadugushul]] || [[word:ngadugukul|ngadugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngaduguthuthu|ngaduguthuthu]] || [[word:ngadugujuju|ngadugujuju]] || [[word:ngadugushushu|ngadugushushu]] || [[word:ngaduguku|ngaduguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngaduguthun|ngaduguthun]] || [[word:ngadugujun|ngadugujun]] || [[word:ngadugushun|ngadugushun]] || [[word:ngadugukun|ngadugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngaduguthuoro|ngaduguthuoro]] || [[word:ngadugujuoro|ngadugujuoro]] || [[word:ngadugushuoro|ngadugushuoro]] || [[word:ngadugukuoro|ngadugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
